header.menuOpenWithRepesca: Open menu · you have a rescue available

streak.keepGoing: Keep it up, don't lose it.
streak.personalRecord: It's your personal best! Don't lose it.

app.title: Car of the Day
app.lockedCarDescription: Sign in to reveal which car it was, save your stats and join the ranking.
app.loginModalDescription: Save your stats in the cloud, compete on the global ranking and play from any device.

result.lockedAnswer: The answer is locked. Sign in to see it.
result.saveProgressBody: Don't lose your stats. Sign up to save your wins and compete on the leaderboard.

myStats.title: My Profile
myStats.promoLogin: Sign in to save your streaks and stats.

nickname.title: Pick your Nick
nickname.description: This will be your name on the arcade ranking. We won't use your Google name or photo.
nickname.permanentWarning: Choose carefully: your nick will be permanent and you won't be able to change it later.
nickname.errorFormat: Letters and numbers only. Max 12 characters.
nickname.errorRules: Use only letters and numbers, max 12 characters.
nickname.errorDuplicate: This name is already taken. Pick another one.
nickname.errorLocked: Your nick is already set and can't be changed.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.empty: No drivers with a nickname yet.
ranking.loginPrompt: Sign in to see the full table and your current position.

scoring.title: System
scoring.basePointsBody: The fewer attempts you need, the more points you get.
scoring.bonusBody: Get it right every day without missing to earn extra points.
scoring.bonusFootnote: The bonus is added to your base points each day.

repesca.errorNeedLogin: You need to sign in to play the rescue.
repesca.errorSelectCar: Pick a car from the list.
repesca.gameRulesNote: Half points · doesn't affect your streak

garage.toastAllGuessed: Congrats! You've already guessed every previous car.
garage.toastRepescaConsumed: You already used today's rescue. Come back tomorrow for another chance.
garage.emptyCatalog: The catalog is empty. Come back when there are cars to collect.
garage.carNoDescription: No spec sheet yet. We'll add more details soon.
garage.repescaConfirmBody: You'll get a random car from the {poolSize} pending ones. You won't see its make, model or country until the game starts.
garage.repescaRuleHalfPoints: Score counts half of a normal game.
garage.repescaHelpBody: Rescue is a daily second chance to catch up on past cars of the day you haven't guessed yet.
garage.repescaHelpSurpriseDesc: Picked at random from your pending cars. You won't see make, model or country until the game starts.
garage.repescaHelpOnceDesc: You can only play one rescue every 24 hours. If you miss, you'll have to wait until tomorrow.
garage.repescaHelpHalfDesc: Whatever you score on a rescue counts half compared to a normal game.
garage.repescaHelpNoStreakDesc: Win or lose, your daily streak stays untouched.
garage.authBody: Sign in to collect your wins, complete the album by country and save your progress.
